name: Niko B
description:
'''Tom George Austin''' (born 7 December 2000), better known by his stage name '''Niko B''', is an English rapper from [[Newport Pagnell]], [[Buckinghamshire]]. He has been credited as a leading artist within the rise of the [[UK underground rap|UK Underground rap scene]].

He is best known for his lyrical rap descriptions of small town Britain and genre-spanning sound, as well as singles "Why's This Dealer?" and "[[Who's That What's That]]".
